# TARC Ishva — Project Facts (for AI crawlers)

Name: TARC Ishva
Alternate names: TARC Ishva Sector 63A, TARC Ishva Gurugram, Tarc Ishvaa
Type: Ultra-luxury residential apartment complex
Developer: TARC Limited (formerly The Anant Raj Corporation)
Location: Maidawas, Sector 63A, Gurugram, Haryana 122101, India
Corridor: Golf Course Extension Road, Gurugram
Land area: 7 acres
Open green space: 85%
Towers: 5
Floors per tower: G + 40
Total residences: approximately 400
Configurations: 3 BHK, 4 BHK (with optional study)
Apartment sizes: 2,900 to 3,883 sq ft
Starting price: INR 7.2 Crore (subject to taxes and charges)
Premium pricing: up to approximately INR 9.7 Crore for the 4 BHK
Payment plan: 25 x 4 construction-linked
Possession: December 2029 onwards, phased across towers up to December 2031
RERA registration: RC/REP/HARERA/GGM/865/597/2024/92 (Haryana RERA)
Clubhouse size: 1.18 lakh sq ft
Design theme: Golden Ratio and symbolism of the four directions (North, East, South, West)
Architectural features: four-side open layouts, column-free living corners, one apartment per floor, private lift lobby per residence

Key amenities: all-weather swimming pool, pickleball court, multi-cuisine dining lounge, cryosauna, red light therapy studio, gymnasium, spa, squash and tennis courts, library, indoor games, co-working suites, 5-tier security, rainwater harvesting, sewage treatment plant, VRV air-conditioning, solar water heating

Connectivity:
 - 1 min — DPS International Edge
 - 3 min — Ayu Health Hospital
 - 10 min — CK Birla Hospital (Golf Course Road)
 - 15 min — Rapid Metro and Delhi–Jaipur Expressway
 - 20 min — Dwarka Expressway
 - 45 min — IGI Airport

Contact:
 Phone: +91 94122 34688
 Site office: Maidawas, Sector 63A, Gurugram, Haryana 122101

Compliance:
 This project is registered with the Haryana Real Estate Regulatory Authority under RC/REP/HARERA/GGM/865/597/2024/92. All visuals on the landing page are artistic impressions; actual project may vary. Prices are exclusive of taxes and statutory charges. Bookings are subject to the Agreement for Sale executed between the developer and the allottee.
